- 3.1 DNA as digital storage (15) · 3.2 The central dogma engineering-first (15) · 3.3 Gene expression and regulation (18) · 3.4 The genetic code as a designed-by-evolution mapping (12) · 3.5 Mutation, repair, and error rates (15) · 3.6 Modern sequencing technology overview (15) · 3.7 Failure section: replication errors, cancer, hereditary disease (20)
